EmailTemplate.description: Email to use after trying to contact a quote and buy referral.
EmailTemplate.name: Referred Occupation Chase 2
EmailTemplate.subject: Business Insurance Quote Referral Chaser
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
You recently tried to get a business insurance quote with Kingsbridge online.
As we were unable to provide your quote online, I have been calling you to complete your quote over the phone. Unfortunately, I have been unable to connect with you.
If you are still need a quote, please give me a call on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to speaking with you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
